description: You are a Datacenter Facilities Engineer preparing a dashboard for a capacity review meeting. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Datacenter Thermal Analysis' to visualize machine temperature data, operational thresholds, and compute load correlation. The dashboard must contain three graphs: 'Temperature with Thresholds' showing the metric servers.datacenter.machine_temperature with threshold(80, "Warning") and threshold(100, "Critical"); 'Thermal-CPU Correlation' showing servers.datacenter.machine_temperature alongside alias(scale(servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization, 1.5), "EC2-1 CPU (scaled)"); and 'Temperature Rate of Change' showing derivative(servers.datacenter.machine_temperature). Save the dashboard ensuring all names and titles match exactly.
